mapper.sql: id, name, email, avatar, role, department, dept_code, sub_org_cd, sub_org_nam, company_cd, jpstn_cd, jpstn_nam, chinese_nam, skills, password, status, managed_dept_codes, managed_company_cd, managed_project_ids, token_version, joined_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE status != 'T' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE role = #{role} AND status != 'T' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE department = #{department} AND status != 'T' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (id, name, email, avatar, role, department, dept_code, sub_org_cd, sub_org_nam, company_cd, chinese_nam, skills, password, status, joined_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{department}, #{deptCode}, #{subOrgCd}, #{subOrgNam}, #{companyCd}, #{chineseNam}, #{skills}, #{password}, #{status}, #{joinedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE status != 'T'
SELECT id FROM sys_user WHERE id LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') ORDER BY CAST(SUBSTRING(id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS UNSIGNED) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE 1=1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status != 'T'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO sys_user (id, name, chinese_nam, email, role, department, dept_code, sub_org_cd, sub_org_nam, company_cd, jpstn_cd, jpstn_nam, password, status) SELECT p.EMP_NUM, p.EMP_NAM, IFNULL(p.CHINESE_NAM, ''), p.EMAIL_ADDR, 'member', o.ORG_NAM, IFNULL(p.ORG_CD, ''), IFNULL(p.SUB_ORG_CD, ''), IFNULL(p.SUB_ORG_NAM, ''), IFNULL(p.COMPANY_CD, ''), IFNULL(p.JPSTN_CD, ''), IFNULL(p.JPSTN_NAM, ''), '1', IFNULL(p.ACT_CLSS_CD, 'C') FROM mdm_if_pa_a p LEFT JOIN mdm_if_or_a o ON p.ORG_CD = o.ORG_CD LEFT JOIN mdm_if_or_a o2 ON p.SUB_ORG_CD = o2.ORG_CD WHERE p.EMP_NAM IS NOT NULL AND p.EMAIL_ADDR IS NOT NULL AND p.ACT_CLSS_CD IN ('C','H');
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user u INNER JOIN mdm_if_pa_a p ON u.id = p.EMP_NUM COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LEFT JOIN mdm_if_or_a o ON p.ORG_CD = o.ORG_CD LEFT JOIN mdm_if_or_a o2 ON p.SUB_ORG_CD = o2.ORG_CD SET u.name = p.EMP_NAM, u.chinese_nam = IFNULL(p.CHINESE_NAM, ''), u.email = p.EMAIL_ADDR, u.department = o.ORG_NAM, u.dept_code = IFNULL(p.ORG_CD, ''), u.sub_org_cd = IFNULL(p.SUB_ORG_CD, ''), u.sub_org_nam = IFNULL(p.SUB_ORG_NAM, ''), u.company_cd = IFNULL(p.COMPANY_CD, ''), u.jpstn_cd = IFNULL(p.JPSTN_CD, ''), u.jpstn_nam = IFNULL(p.JPSTN_NAM, ''), u.status = IFNULL(p.ACT_CLSS_CD, 'C'), u.updated_at = NOW() WHERE p.EMP_NAM IS NOT NULL AND p.EMAIL_ADDR IS NOT NULL AND p.ACT_CLSS_CD IN ('C','H');
UPDATE sys_user u LEFT JOIN mdm_if_pa_a p ON u.id = p.EMP_NUM COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci SET u.status = 'T', u.updated_at = NOW() WHERE u.status != 'T' AND (p.EMP_NUM IS NULL OR p.ACT_CLSS_CD = 'T');
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user u WHERE u.role = 'admin' AND u.status != 'T' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM mdm_if_pa_a p WHERE p.EMP_NUM = u.id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci );
SELECT u.id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.role = 'admin' AND u.status != 'T' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM mdm_if_pa_a p WHERE p.EMP_NUM = u.id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ) ORDER BY u.id;
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET role = #{role}, managed_dept_codes = #{managedDeptCodes}, managed_company_cd = #{managedCompanyCd}, managed_project_ids = #{managedProjectIds}, token_version = token_version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET managed_project_ids = #{managedProjectIds}, token_version = token_version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET token_version = token_version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.EMP_NUM FROM mdm_if_pa_a p WHERE p.EMP_NAM IS NOT NULL AND p.EMAIL_ADDR IS NOT NULL AND p.ACT_CLSS_CD IN ('C','H') AND p.EMP_NUM IS NOT NULL
